notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current official menu page, dinner PDF, dessert PDF, and active Wines of Del Rio menu image.
The current food catalog contains 31 unique items: 19 dinner, 6 dessert, and 6 active special-event food rows; beverages and wine rows are excluded.
The restaurant provides item names and descriptions but no complete allergen matrix; only directly supported ingredient signals are asserted.
Silence in a description remains allergen-data unavailable, and coconut milk, cocoa butter, and the phrase milk-fed are not treated as dairy ingredients.
The app shellfish profile explicitly includes mollusks, so directly named octopus and squid are classified under shellfish.
The baseline combined current menus with expired event menus, emitted three dessert headings/options as standalone items, and duplicated Lobster Fettuccine from PDF and structured HTML spellings.
The prior allergen pass both missed direct terms and promoted row bleed/common-dish inference as official ingredient evidence.

findings.summary: Nine of 39 baseline rows were stale event items, headings/nested options, or a duplicate PDF spelling.
findings.resolution: Replaced the baseline with 31 current unique food rows and excluded beverage headings, nested cheese choices, duplicates, and expired event items.

findings.summary: Twenty of 30 surviving baseline items had incorrect or incomplete allergen signals.
findings.resolution: Reclassified current items from direct item-name and description evidence with plant/cocoa/milk-fed exclusions and mollusk-aware shellfish semantics.

findings.summary: Soft Shell Crab inherited egg text from the following Spring Cassoulet row and an unsupported milk signal.
findings.resolution: Restored Soft Shell Crab to the directly supported shellfish signal only and preserved Spring Cassoulet egg on its own row.

findings.summary: Official menus are descriptive menus rather than a complete allergen disclosure.
findings.resolution: Left six current items allergen-data unavailable and did not treat absent terms as negative claims.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a 31-item current official-food snapshot with corrected menu membership and conservative allergen signals.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/1789-repair-input.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (targeted copy; verified 31 items, 25 direct ingredient signals, 6 unavailable, 11 categories, zero known artifacts)
